title: Carry out post-harvest operations
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Carry out post-harvest operations demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for post-harvest operations

pcs.text: Identify post-harvest treatments, operations to be performed and client specifications with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify post-harvest treatments, operations to be performed and client specifications with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify post-harvest treatments, operations to be performed and client specifications with supervisor.

pcs.text: Select materials, tools, equipment and machinery according to post-harvest operations requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select materials, tools, equipment and machinery according to post-harvest operations requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select materials, tools, equipment and machinery according to post-harvest operations requirements.

pcs.text: Carry out pre-operational and safety checks on tools, equipment and machinery
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out pre-operational and safety checks on tools, equipment and machinery?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out pre-operational and safety checks on tools, equipment and machinery.

pcs.text: Identify the Hazard Analysis and Critical Control Points (HACCP) and food safety requirements applicable to crop under cultivation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the Hazard Analysis and Critical Control Points (HACCP) and food safety requirements applicable to crop under cultivation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the Hazard Analysis and Critical Control Points (HACCP) and food safety requirements applicable to crop under cultivation.

pcs.text: Identify site quarantine protocols and farm and personal hygiene requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify site quarantine protocols and farm and personal hygiene requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify site quarantine protocols and farm and personal hygiene requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for post-harvest operations

elements.title: Transport harvested produce

pcs.text: Transport produce to post-harvest processing or storage area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Transport produce to post-harvest processing or storage area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Transport produce to post-harvest processing or storage area.

pcs.text: Maintain required temperature of harvested produce
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain required temperature of harvested produce?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain required temperature of harvested produce.

pcs.text: Maintain containers, materials and equipment in good working order according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain containers, materials and equipment in good working order according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain containers, materials and equipment in good working order according to workplace requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Transport harvested produce

elements.title: Grade, label, treat, weigh and pack produce

pcs.text: Grade and label produce according to client specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Grade and label produce according to client specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Grade and label produce according to client specifications.

pcs.text: Apply post-harvest treatments according to produce requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply post-harvest treatments according to produce requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply post-harvest treatments according to produce requirements.

pcs.text: Identify quality parameters of produce and specifications for packaging materials, containers, filling techniques and labelling
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify quality parameters of produce and specifications for packaging materials, containers, filling techniques and labelling?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify quality parameters of produce and specifications for packaging materials, containers, filling techniques and labelling.

pcs.text: Select packaging materials and containers for specific produce
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select packaging materials and containers for specific produce?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select packaging materials and containers for specific produce.

pcs.text: Weigh filled containers, record weight and repack to correct weight
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Weigh filled containers, record weight and repack to correct weight?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Weigh filled containers, record weight and repack to correct weight.

pcs.text: Use required filling techniques for specific containers and produce
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use required filling techniques for specific containers and produce?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use required filling techniques for specific containers and produce.

pcs.text: Apply wraps and lids, and label containers according to client specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply wraps and lids, and label containers according to client specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply wraps and lids, and label containers according to client specifications.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Grade, label, treat, weigh and pack produce

elements.title: Store produce in a facility

pcs.text: Place containers onto pallets or racks to ensure stability and optimum airflow
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Place containers onto pallets or racks to ensure stability and optimum airflow?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Place containers onto pallets or racks to ensure stability and optimum airflow.

pcs.text: Transport and arrange pallets or racks in storage facility
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Transport and arrange pallets or racks in storage facility?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Transport and arrange pallets or racks in storage facility.

pcs.text: Read storage facility monitoring gauges, and report abnormal readings to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Read storage facility monitoring gauges, and report abnormal readings to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Read storage facility monitoring gauges, and report abnormal readings to supervisor.

pcs.text: Check condition of stored produce, and remove damaged produce and containers from storage facility
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check condition of stored produce, and remove damaged produce and containers from storage facility?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check condition of stored produce, and remove damaged produce and containers from storage facility.

pcs.text: Clean storage facility and packing containers
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean storage facility and packing containers?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean storage facility and packing containers.

pcs.text: Record and report post-harvest operations according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record and report post-harvest operations according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and report post-harvest operations according to workplace requirements.
